name: Heroes of Unknown Wars
overview: During the Cold War, the Soviet leadership sent the best military personnel, diplomats and intelligence officers to the hot spots of the world to support friendly countries in resolving military conflicts. Soviet specialists are helping North Korea, Vietnam, Egypt, Ethiopia, and Lebanon resist aggressors and prevent World War III in the context of the Caribbean crisis. The project is based on the memories of veterans of global global armed conflicts, whose exploits played a crucial role in maintaining peace on the planet and forever changed the balance of power on the geopolitical map of the Earth.
